title: Wheel of Dependent Origination
justification: This talk provides the most complete and systematic exposition of Dependent Origination, walking through all twelve links with clear explanations and practical examples (ice cream, porridge, child development). It uniquely includes both the arising of suffering AND how an enlightened being functions within the same framework, offering a complete arc. The teaching voice is accessible yet profound, with memorable analogies and a strong pedagogical structure that can serve as an excellent spine for additional material.
summary: Bhante Bodhidhamma systematically explains the twelve links of Dependent Origination as a present-moment psychological process, using vivid examples like ice cream and porridge to illustrate how suffering arises through identification with desire. He concludes by describing how an enlightened being operates within the same framework but without the grasping that creates suffering.

relevance.note: Entirely dedicated to dependent origination teaching
